alt: Exquisite mandarinfish showcasing its incredibly vibrant blue, orange, and green psychedelic patterns
caption: The mandarinfish is a spectacularly colorful, small dragonet famous for its intricate psychedelic patterns.
acquisitionNotes: Breathtaking 4524x3016 hero portrait capturing flawless neon blue and orange pigmentation. Local WebP ingested from https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/e/e7/Pez_mandar%C3%ADn_%28Synchiropus_splendidus%29%2C_Anilao%2C_Filipinas%2C_2023-08-24%2C_DD_207.jpg
